## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type

- [ ] New stack
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Hook change
- [ ] Rule change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash -n` passes on all modified `.sh` files
- [ ] Rules have `globs:` frontmatter
- [ ] `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('registry/projects.yml'))"` passes
- [ ] Changelog updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] VERSION bumped (if releasing)
